case_title: MCCANTS-THREATT, AMY et al VS COLEMAN, LEE OLA MRS.

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCCANTS-THREATT, AMY MCCANTS-THREAT , AMY C/O MCCANTS, CAROLINE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT COLEMAN, LEE OLA MRS. NON APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. FAILURE TO SUSTAIN BURDEN OF PROOF STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,911.00 FILED BY MCCANTS-THREATT, AMY MCCANTS-THREAT , AMY C/O MCCANTS, CAROLINE AS TO DEFENDANT COLEMAN, LEE OLA MRS. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-04-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
